description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisite: Leone Clan, level 16+
You stand on the zenith of power that the bloodline provides, that only one other has achived before. While this power can be sparingly used, it will ensure that you help pave the way for a better future. You gain the following benefits;

  • You can only activate this feature whenever your would transform, and it lasts for one minute. After that minute your body goes in to shock, you become unconscious for one hour. This can only be used a number of times equal to 1/3 of your proficiency bonus, then never again. For that minute you gain the following benefits;

    • You gain double of the ammount of hitpoints that you would gain from the start of your turn.

    • You gain 4 Fury die at the start of your turn and all Relentless Hunter clan options count as having one dice towards their cost when you would use them.

    • At the start of your turn, you gain an additional action or bonus action as well as another reaction.

    • The first time you are reduced to 0 Hit points by a hostile creature or effect, you are instead reduced to 1 Hit point and cannot go below this 1 hit point until the end of your next turn.
